mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : SrvyDAO.sbjctMrkOynSrvyCntSelect 설 명 : 과목성적공개설문수조회 */ SELECT COUNT(SRVY_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND MRK_OYN = 'Y' AND SRVY_GBNCD = 'LCTR_SRVY' AND SRVY_TYCD = 'SRVY_GNRL_LCTR_EVL' AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
AND SRVY_ID <> #{srvyId}

/* SQL ID : SrvyDAO.mrkRfltSrvyList 설 명 : 성적반영설문목록 */ SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND SRVY_GBNCD = 'LCTR_SRVY' AND SRVY_TYCD = 'SRVY_GNRL_LCTR_EVL' AND UP_SRVY_ID IS NULL AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}

/* SQL ID : SrvyDAO.srvyGrpSbjctList 설 명 : 설문그룹과목목록조회 */ WITH DVCLAS_SBJCT AS ( SELECT SBJCT_ID , SRVY_ID , BYTEAM_SUBSRVY_USEYN , (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE UP_SRVY_ID = SRVY.SRVY_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN ='Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS SUB_SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY WHERE ( SRVY_GRP_ID = (SELECT SRVY_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DVCLAS_REGYN = 'Y') OR SRVY_ID = (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DVCLAS_REGYN = 'N') ) AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND UP_SRVY_ID IS NULL ) SELECT SBJCT_ID , DVCLAS_NO , (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID) AS SRVY_ID , (SELECT BYTEAM_SUBSRVY_USEYN FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID) AS BYTEAM_SUBSRVY_USEYN , (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_TRGT WHERE SRVY_ID = (SELECT SUB_SRVY_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID))) AS LRN_GRP_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID AND LRN_GRP_ID = (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_TRGT WHERE SRVY_ID = (SELECT SUB_SRVY_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID)))) AS LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID IN (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT) ORDER BY DVCLAS_NO

/* SQL ID : SrvyDAO.srvySelect 설 명 : 설문조회 */ WITH SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SRVY.SBJCT_ID AND SRVY.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' ), SUB_SRVY AS ( SELECT SRVY_ID, UP_SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND UP_SRVY_ID IS NOT NULL ) SELECT SRVY.* , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SUB_SRVY SS WHERE SS.UP_SRVY_ID = SRVY.SRVY_ID) THEN 'SRVY_TEAM' ELSE 'SRVY' END AS SRVY_GBN , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = SRVY.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , (SELECT SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SRVY.SBJCT_ID) AS SBJCTNM , (SELECT DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SRVY.SBJCT_ID) AS DVCLAS_NO , (SELECT COUNT(PTCP.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PTCP WHERE PTCP.PTCP_DTTM IS NOT NULL AND PTCP.SRVY_ID IN ( SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} UNION ALL SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE UP_SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) AND PTCP.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER) ) AS PTCP_USER_CNT , (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_TRGT WHERE SRVY_ID = (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE UP_SRVY_ID = SRVY.SRVY_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN ='Y' AND ROWNUM = 1))) AS LRN_GRP_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = SRVY.SBJCT_ID AND LRN_GRP_ID = (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_TRGT WHERE SRVY_ID = (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE UP_SRVY_ID = SRVY.SRVY_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN ='Y' AND ROWNUM = 1)))) LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY WHERE SRVY_ID = #{srvyId}

/* SQL ID : SrvyDAO.srvyTeamList 설 명 : 설문팀목록조회 */ SELECT SRVY.SRVY_ID , SRVY_TRGT.TEAM_ID , (SELECT TEAMNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND TEAM_ID = SRVY_TRGT.TEAM_ID) AS TEAMNM , SRVY.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN FROM TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_TRGT SRVY_TRGT ON SRVY.SRVY_ID = SRVY_TRGT.SRVY_ID WHERE SRVY.DELYN = 'N' AND SRVY.USEYN = 'Y' AND SRVY.UP_SRVY_ID = #{srvyId}
/* SQL ID : SrvyDAO.srvyIdSelect 설 명 : 설문아이디조회 */ SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND SRVY_GRP_ID = #{srvyGrpId} AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND UP_SRVY_ID IS NULL
